initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_class,
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
JOIN 
    item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    customer_demographics ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq >= 1200
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq <= 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_class,
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count
ORDER BY 
    i_class,
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count
LIMIT 100;
